headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -57.5)
key_insights: Fears trending up 13% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 95 quotes including 66 at strong intensity, though the score dropped significantly from yesterday's peak.
• This frustration level remains well above the typical range but shows clear cooling from recent highs.
• Optimism stays deeply negative with only 10 strong quotes among 50 total, continuing near its lowest levels in the 131-day period.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
